blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,872 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

Wednesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
